title: Queen's Blade Re:Build
description:
■All characters involved in sexual content are over the age of 21.

[Game Description]

A roguelite deckbuilder featuring strong, beautiful female warriors!

Queen's Blade Re:Build combines real-time card battle with roguelite deckbuilder.

 

In this world, female warriors compete in a tournament called the Queen's Blade, 

and the strongest woman becomes queen and rules over all.

Choose your character and embark on a journey to defeat the strongest Queen.

Make your way through random choices, defeat rivals, and get new cards to

power up your deck!

Unleash devastating combos, and aim for the Queen's Throne.

Your skills will be put to the test by real-time card battles.

The key to victory is Armor Break.

Every warrior is protected by armor on the upper, middle, and lower body.

First, shatter their armor. Once their defense is stripped away, deliver the finishing blow!

As you progress, new warriors, cards, and even stronger rivals will be unlocked.

For those who dare to push their limits, a Challenge Mode awaits.

Do you have what it takes to become the true Queen?

[Development Team]

The card game system is developed by Hobby Japan's Card Game Development

Team, which has over 15 years of experience in the field.

[Guidelines for Video Streaming and Posting of "Queen's Blade Re:Build"]

Original Commentary and Creativity: Streamed or posted videos must include your own unique creative commentary or elements (e.g., live voice commentary, text commentary, facecam).

No Paywalls: You may not stream or post videos that require viewers to pay a fee or fulfill specific paid conditions to watch.

Monetization: Using the official monetization features provided by video hosting platforms (e.g., YouTube Partner Program) is generally permitted.

Game Title Inclusion: Please include the title "Queen's Blade Re:Build" or "Queen's Blade" in the video title or description.

Prohibited Content (Edits & Clips): Videos that only showcase the ending, only compile Armor Break sequences, or only cut together dialogue/story scenes are strictly prohibited.

Audio-Only Content: Extracting and using only the game's audio or BGM is prohibited.

Platform Policy Compliance: The game may contain expressions that conflict with certain video streaming platforms' Terms of Service. Please note that we take no responsibility if your video or account is suspended or deleted by the platform.

Defamation and Public Order: Content that defames the game or our company, significantly damages the image of the franchise, or violates public order, morals, laws, and regulations is strictly prohibited.

Inappropriate Use and False Representation: You may not use this game to promote products/services of your own or a third party, engage in political or religious activities, or falsely claim or imply any official endorsement or sponsorship by our company.

Enforcement and Changes

If you fail to comply with these guidelines, or if we deem a video inappropriate, we may request the suspension of public viewing or the immediate removal of the video.

These guidelines are subject to change without prior notice.
description_short: A roguelite deckbuilder featuring strong, beautiful female warriors. We fused real time card games and roguelite together to make the exciting single player deckbuilder. Discover new cards and item, Craft a strong deck. Break your rival of all their armor and defeat them with a finishing move!
